category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a lexical database for the English language; Princeton WordNet documentation describes WordNet as a lexical database for English.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the Princeton WordNet site; official site branding uses WordNet.
docs_sources: Official Princeton WordNet documentation page provides the WordNet 3.0 Reference Manual and command-line manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official source_facts.source-archive is a Princeton release tarball, not a source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a lexical database; source_facts.executables includes CLI tools wn and wnb; Princeton docs cover WordNet commands and database files.
